speaker: Mira
text: The bridge... it's completely destroyed. How am I supposed to cross this?

speaker: Solen
text: The Demon King's forces destroyed it long ago — to trap anyone who might challenge him on this side of time.

speaker: Mira
text: Then how do I fix it? There has to be a way.

speaker: Solen
text: There is. Scattered across this land are remnants strong enough to mend it. You will need an Ancient Stone — the foundation of the old world. And a Timber Log — from the great trees that once stood before the fracture.

speaker: Solen
text: The stone lies to the east, guarded by the Demon King's soldiers. The timber is deeper in, past the second clearing. Collect them both, and the bridge can be restored.

speaker: Mira
text: Stone and timber... I'll find them. Whatever it takes.
